description: '''Fidget house''', or '''fidget''', is "defined by snatched vocal snippets, pitch-bent dirty basslines and rave-style synth stabs over glitchy 4/4 beats." It contains influences from [[Chicago house]], [[Detroit techno]], [[Baltimore club]], [[Kuduro]] and [[hip hop music|hip hop]]. Purveyors of the genre include Sinden, AC Slater, [[Danger (musician)|Danger]], Hervé, [[Jack Beats]] and [[Switch (house DJ)|Switch]]. The term fidget house was coined by DJs/producers Jesse Rose and Switch, "as a joke, which has now gone a little too far."
